// Find all AAS shells and identify the transport robot in Hall 4
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_DISPLAY_NAME]->(dn:LangString)
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_DESCRIPTION]->(desc:LangString)
RETURN aas.id, aas.idShort, sm.idShort, sc.id AS templateSemanticId, 
       asset.globalAssetId, dn.text AS displayName, desc.text AS description

// Find what entities/assets are inside Hall 4's hierarchical structure
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'Hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'HierarchicalStructures'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(parent:Entity)
MATCH (parent)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(child:Entity)
MATCH (child)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
RETURN parent.idShort, child.idShort, asset.globalAssetId

args.cypher:
// Find shells with AGV technical data and locate which one is in Hall 4
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/SubmodelTemplate/technicaldataagv/1/0'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(hall:Property)
WHERE hall.idShort = 'Hall'
OPTIONAL MATCH (hall)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(lv:LangString)
OPTIONAL MATCH (hall)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(val:LangString)
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, sm.idShort, hall.value, hall.idShortPath

// Find all AAS shells that have AGV technical data submodels
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/SubmodelTemplate/technicaldataagv/1/0'})
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, sm.idShort, sm.id

// Find instance shells derived from AGV type shells
MATCH (instance:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:DERIVED_FROM]->(type:AssetAdministrationShell)
WHERE type.idShort IN ['MiR100_Type', 'MiR250_Type']
RETURN instance.idShort, instance.id, type.idShort AS derivedFrom

// List submodels of each instance shell to find location info
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.id IN ['urn:aas:mir100:001', 'urn:aas:mir250:001', 'urn:aas:mir250:002']
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS templateSemanticId
ORDER BY aas.idShort, sm.idShort

// Find shells with FacilityInformation submodels to understand hall structure
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/dfki/SubmodelTemplate/FacilityInformation/1/0'})
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, sm.idShort, sm.id

// Explore Hall 4 shell - list all submodels and their elements
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS templateSemanticId, el.idShort, el.value, labels(el) AS types
